info.title: Moetruyen Public API
info.description:
Unofficial read-only REST API for [MoeTruyen](https://moetruyen.net/).

## Quick start

Use the `/v2` routes for the current stable surface.

## Request notes

- All API endpoints have a global rate limit of 7 requests per second per IP.
- Include a valid `Origin` header such as `https://suicaodex.com` or `https://moetruyen.net` when making browser-like requests.

## Versioning

- From 01/04/2026, v1 routes are deprecated, pleade use v2 instead.

## Repositories

- API repo: [TNTKien/moetruyen-public-api](https://github.com/TNTKien/moetruyen-public-api)
- Original site repo: [dex593/web1 (MoeTruyen)](https://github.com/dex593/web1)

tags.name: Manga
tags.description: Manga list, detail, ranking, random, and manga-family v2 resources.

tags.name: Chapters
tags.description: Chapter reader payloads and manga chapter listings.

tags.name: Genres
tags.description: Genre reference data and manga count metadata.

tags.name: Teams
tags.description: Public translation team list, detail, members, updates, and associated manga.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Public user profile summaries and visible comment activity.

tags.name: Comments
tags.description: Recent comments plus manga-level and chapter-level public comment threads.

get.description: Basic service health check for uptime probes and deployment verification.

Returns paginated top manga using the shared v2 manga base shape. Use `sort_by=views` with `time=24h|7d|30d|all_time`, or `sort_by=bookmarks|comments` with `time=all_time`. If `time` is omitted, it defaults to `24h` for `views` and `all_time` for `bookmarks` or `comments`. Use `include=stats`, `include=genres`, or `include=stats,genres` to expand each manga item.

commentCount.description: Total number of visible comments for the manga.

totalViews.description: Total accumulated chapter views for the manga.

bookmarkCount.description: Total number of users who bookmarked the manga.

stats.description: Optional aggregate statistics. Present only when `include=stats` is requested.

rank.description: 1-based ranking position in the current result set.

sortBy.description: Ranking metric used for this list.

time.description: Ranking window used for this list.

value.description: Metric value that determined the ranking position for this item.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number starting from `1`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of ranked manga items to return per page. Allowed range: `1` to `100`.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Ranking metric. Use `views`, `bookmarks`, or `comments`.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Ranking window. Use `24h`, `7d`, `30d`, or `all_time`. Omit it to default to `24h` for `views`, or `all_time` for `bookmarks` and `comments`.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Comma-separated expansions. Supported values: `stats`, `genres`. Example: `stats,genres`.

get.description: Returns 1 to 10 random public manga items using the shared v2 manga base shape. Use `include=stats`, `include=genres`, or `include=stats,genres` to expand each manga item.

commentCount.description: Total number of visible comments for the manga.

totalViews.description: Total accumulated chapter views for the manga.

bookmarkCount.description: Total number of users who bookmarked the manga.

stats.description: Optional aggregate statistics. Present only when `include=stats` is requested.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of random manga items to return. Allowed range: `1` to `10`.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Comma-separated expansions. Supported values: `stats`, `genres`. Example: `stats,genres`.

get.description: Returns paginated public manga using the shared v2 manga base shape. `genre` accepts comma-separated genre ids with OR semantics, `genrex` excludes manga that have any listed genre ids, and `include` controls optional expansions such as `stats` and `genres`.

commentCount.description: Total number of visible comments for the manga.

totalViews.description: Total accumulated chapter views for the manga.

bookmarkCount.description: Total number of users who bookmarked the manga.

stats.description: Optional aggregate statistics. Present only when `include=stats` is requested.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number starting from `1`. Used with `limit` for pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of manga items to return per page. Allowed range: `1` to `100`.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text search term matched against manga title, slug, and aliases.

parameters.name: genre
parameters.description: Optional inclusive genre filter for v2. Accepts comma-separated genre ids with OR semantics.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional manga status filter. Use one of the documented public status enum values.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort mode. `updated_at` sorts by recent updates, `title` sorts alphabetically, and `popular` sorts by view-derived popularity.

parameters.name: hasChapters
parameters.description: Chapter-presence filter. `0` keeps manga that have chapters. `1` keeps manga that currently have no chapters.

parameters.name: genrex
parameters.description: Optional exclusion genre filter for v2. Manga that have any of these genre ids are removed from results.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Comma-separated expansions. Supported values: `stats`, `genres`. Example: `stats,genres`.

get.description: Returns a single manga using the shared v2 manga base shape. Use `include=stats`, `include=genres`, or `include=stats,genres` to expand the response with optional aggregates and genre metadata.

commentCount.description: Total number of visible comments for the manga.

totalViews.description: Total accumulated chapter views for the manga.

bookmarkCount.description: Total number of users who bookmarked the manga.

stats.description: Optional aggregate statistics. Present only when `include=stats` is requested.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Comma-separated expansions. Supported values: `stats`, `genres`. Example: `stats,genres`.

get.description: A light-weight search endpoint, use `/v2/manga` for full filtering support.

commentCount.description: Total number of visible comments for the manga.

totalViews.description: Total accumulated chapter views for the manga.

bookmarkCount.description: Total number of users who bookmarked the manga.

stats.description: Optional aggregate statistics. Present only when `include=stats` is requested.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search term matched against manga title, slug, and aliases.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of search results to return. Allowed range: `1` to `20`.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Comma-separated expansions. Supported values: `stats`, `genres`. Example: `stats,genres`.

get.description: Returns paginated manga associated with a team using the shared v2 manga base shape. `genre` accepts comma-separated genre ids with OR semantics, `genrex` excludes listed genre ids, and `include` controls optional `stats` and `genres` expansions.

commentCount.description: Total number of visible comments for the manga.

totalViews.description: Total accumulated chapter views for the manga.

bookmarkCount.description: Total number of users who bookmarked the manga.

stats.description: Optional aggregate statistics. Present only when `include=stats` is requested.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number starting from `1`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of manga items to return per page. Allowed range: `1` to `100`.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text search term matched against manga title, slug, and aliases.

parameters.name: genre
parameters.description: Optional inclusive genre filter for team manga in v2. Accepts comma-separated genre ids with OR semantics.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional manga status filter for the team manga listing.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort mode. `updated_at` sorts by recent updates, `title` sorts alphabetically, and `popular` sorts by view-derived popularity.

parameters.name: genrex
parameters.description: Optional exclusion genre filter for team manga in v2. Manga that have any of these genre ids are removed from results.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Comma-separated expansions. Supported values: `stats`, `genres`. Example: `stats,genres`.

get.description: Returns public chapter metadata for a manga id ordered by latest chapter first.
Returns chapter reader metadata, page URLs, and adjacent chapter links for a public chapter.

403.description: Chapter requires password or is locked

get.description: Returns paginated recent visible root comments across public manga and chapters.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number starting from `1`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of comment threads to return per page. Allowed range: `1` to `100`.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Comment sort field. Use `created_at`.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Comment sort direction. `desc` returns newest first, `asc` returns oldest first.

get.description: Returns paginated visible manga-level comment threads for a manga id.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number starting from `1`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of comment threads to return per page. Allowed range: `1` to `100`.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Comment sort field. Use `created_at`.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Comment sort direction. `desc` returns newest first, `asc` returns oldest first.

get.description: Returns paginated visible comment threads for a public chapter id.

403.description: Chapter requires password or is locked

parameters.name: page

parameters.name: limit

parameters.name: sort

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Comment sort direction. `desc` returns newest first, `asc` returns oldest first.

get.description: Returns public genres with visible manga counts.
Returns paginated approved translation teams with optional search and team-specific sort modes.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number starting from `1`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of teams to return per page. Allowed range: `1` to `100`.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text search term matched against team name, slug, and intro.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort mode for the team list.

get.description: Returns public-safe metadata for an approved translation team.
Returns paginated recent chapter updates associated with an approved translation team.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number starting from `1`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of team updates to return per page. Allowed range: `1` to `100`.

get.description: Returns approved public-facing members for an approved translation team.
Returns paginated public-visible manga comments and forum replies for a username.
Returns a public-safe user profile summary for a username.
